business.name: Virginia Beach Handyman
business.tagline: When it breaks, we make it right

hero.headline: *Bill Green* fixes what's broken — for 15 years running
hero.subheadline: One call handles everything from weekend storm damage to that kitchen drawer that finally gave up. Fast response, fair pricing, work that lasts.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: From Storm Damage to Daily Repairs
services_section.subheading: No job too big or small — we handle what needs handling

services.title: Storm & Wind Damage Repair
services.description: When Virginia Beach weather hits hard, we respond fast. Roof repairs, structural fixes, and everything the storm left behind.

services.title: Roof & Leak Repairs
services.description: Stop the drip before it becomes a flood. Professional roof patching, shingle replacement, and waterproofing that actually works.

services.title: Home Improvement Projects
services.description: Kitchen updates, bathroom fixes, that renovation you've been putting off. We make your house work better for how you live.

services.title: Property Maintenance
services.description: Regular upkeep for rental properties and homeowners. Scheduled maintenance that prevents bigger problems down the road.

about.heading: Bill Green — Virginia Beach's Go-To Handyman
about.body: For over 15 years, Bill has been the name Virginia Beach homeowners and property managers trust when things break. From emergency storm repairs to planned improvements, every job gets the same attention to detail and fair pricing. Licensed, experienced, and always straight with you about what needs doing.

reviews.name: D. G.
reviews.text: Bill has been my handyman for over 15 years. I trust his experience completely and he's an excellent communicator throughout every project.

reviews.name: Melissa M.
reviews.text: My go-to for two rental properties. His professionalism and attention to detail are outstanding. Always punctual and keeps me informed.

reviews.name: Colton D.
reviews.text: As a maintenance coordinator, finding good techs is rare. Bill is a diamond — quick communication, transparent pricing, great work, nice guy.

reviews.name: Ross B.
reviews.text: Bill saved us after weekend wind damage. Quick to answer and even quicker to fix the issues. Highly recommend for any repair needs.

cta.heading: Ready to Fix What's Broken?
cta.body: Call Bill directly for honest pricing and scheduling that works around your life. Free estimates on all projects.
